song.title: Lord Jesus You are so beautiful
song.lyrics:
[1] Lord Jesus, You are so beautiful, And in Your person peace abides To soothe my soul. O Jesus, be my light and my love. Though I'm in shadows of the earth, I think only above.
[c] Lord Jesus, take from me all my empty yearnings. Make me to give to You all my nights and mornings. I want a clear sky between us and a well-lit straight way. Lord, guide me every moment today.
[2] And if my mind from my spirit part, If doubts and fears should hold my heart And control my thoughts; Then, Lord, press faith into my heart, Seal me and claim me as Your own— By Your blood I'm bought.
